Second, AR converges faster and begins overfitting by step 14,000, while MDLM converges more slowly and is still improving at step 20,000, suggesting different compute-optimal training regimes. Third, quantitative diversity analysis over 1,000 generated samples reveals a structural diversity-fluency trade-off: AR produces fluent but repetitive outputs (99.8% begin with the same word), while MDLM generates more diverse narratives (93.4% unique 5-word openings, higher Distinct-n, lower Self-BLEU), at the cost of occasional grammatical inconsistencies. All code, trained checkpoints, and data pipelines are released for reproducibility.

</details>


### [336] [Multiperspectivity as a Resource for Narrative Similarity Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22103)
*Max Upravitelev,Veronika Solopova,Jing Yang,Charlott Jakob,Premtim Sahitaj,Ariana Sahitaj,Vera Schmitt*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出通过创建LLM角色集合来应对叙事相似性预测中的多视角挑战，在SemEval-2026任务4上达到0.705准确率，发现集合规模提升性能，实践者角色误差相关性低带来更大增益，性别相关词汇与准确率负相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 叙事相似性预测本质上是解释性任务，同一文本的不同有效解读会产生不同的相似性判断，这对编码单一标准答案的语义评估基准构成根本挑战。论文不是将这种多视角性视为需要克服的问题，而是将其纳入预测系统的决策过程。

Method: 创建了31个LLM角色集合，包括遵循解释框架的实践者和更直观的普通风格角色。在SemEval-2026 Task 4数据集上进行实验，采用多数投票的集合决策机制，分析集合规模、角色类型对性能的影响。

Result: 系统达到0.705的准确率。准确率随集合规模增加而提高，符合弱化独立性下的Condorcet陪审团定理动态。实践者角色单独表现较差但误差相关性更低，在多数投票下带来更大的集合增益。错误分析显示，所有角色类别中性别相关的解释词汇与准确率存在一致的负相关。

Conclusion: 研究强调了考虑解释多样性的评估框架的必要性。性别相关词汇与准确率的负相关可能表明：要么关注了与基准无关的维度，要么存在标准答案中未包含的有效解释。多视角方法能够更好地处理叙事相似性预测中的解释性本质。

Abstract: Predicting narrative similarity can be understood as an inherently interpretive task: different, equally valid readings of the same text can produce divergent interpretations and thus different similarity judgments, posing a fundamental challenge for semantic evaluation benchmarks that encode a single ground truth. Rather than treating this multiperspectivity as a challenge to overcome, we propose to incorporate it in the decision making process of predictive systems. To explore this strategy, we created an ensemble of 31 LLM personas. These range from practitioners following interpretive frameworks to more intuitive, lay-style characters. Our experiments were conducted on the SemEval-2026 Task 4 dataset, where the system achieved an accuracy score of 0.705. Accuracy improves with ensemble size, consistent with Condorcet Jury Theorem-like dynamics under weakened independence. Practitioner personas perform worse individually but produce less correlated errors, yielding larger ensemble gains under majority voting. Our error analysis reveals a consistent negative association between gender-focused interpretive vocabulary and accuracy across all persona categories, suggesting either attention to dimensions not relevant for the benchmark or valid interpretations absent from the ground truth. This finding underscores the need for evaluation frameworks that account for interpretive plurality.

</details>


### [337] [The Semantic Ladder: A Framework for Progressive Formalization of Natural Language Content for Knowledge Graphs and AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22136)
*Lars Vogt*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出"语义阶梯"架构框架，通过渐进式形式化方法弥合自然语言与形式语义模型之间的鸿沟，支持从文本片段到本体论和高阶逻辑模型的语义层次转换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语义数据和知识基础设施需要调和两种根本不同的表示形式：自然语言（大多数知识创建和传播的方式）与形式语义模型（支持机器可操作的集成、互操作和推理）。弥合这一鸿沟仍然是核心挑战，特别是在数据录入点需要完全语义形式化时。

Method: 引入"语义阶梯"架构框架，基于模块化语义单元作为可识别意义载体的概念，组织跨越不同语义明确性水平的表示，从自然语言文本片段到基于本体论和高阶逻辑模型。层级间的转换支持语义丰富化、陈述结构化和逻辑建模，同时保持语义连续性和可追溯性。

Result: 该框架支持增量构建语义知识空间，减少语义解析负担，并支持异构表示（包括自然语言、结构化语义模型和基于向量的嵌入）的集成，为可扩展、可互操作且AI就绪的数据和知识基础设施提供基础。

Conclusion: 语义阶梯通过渐进式形式化方法有效弥合了自然语言与形式语义模型之间的鸿沟，为构建可扩展、可互操作且AI就绪的数据和知识基础设施提供了系统化框架。

Abstract: Semantic data and knowledge infrastructures must reconcile two fundamentally different forms of representation: natural language, in which most knowledge is created and communicated, and formal semantic models, which enable machine-actionable integration, interoperability, and reasoning. Bridging this gap remains a central challenge, particularly when full semantic formalization is required at the point of data entry. Here, we introduce the Semantic Ladder, an architectural framework that enables the progressive formalization of data and knowledge. Building on the concept of modular semantic units as identifiable carriers of meaning, the framework organizes representations across levels of increasing semantic explicitness, ranging from natural language text snippets to ontology-based and higher-order logical models. Transformations between levels support semantic enrichment, statement structuring, and logical modelling while preserving semantic continuity and traceability. This approach enables the incremental construction of semantic knowledge spaces, reduces the semantic parsing burden, and supports the integration of heterogeneous representations, including natural language, structured semantic models, and vector-based embeddings. The Semantic Ladder thereby provides a foundation for scalable, interoperable, and AI-ready data and knowledge infrastructures.

</details>


### [338] [Enhancing Document-Level Machine Translation via Filtered Synthetic Corpora and Two-Stage LLM Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22186)
*Ireh Kim,Tesia Sker,Chanwoo Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出两阶段微调策略，利用LLM增强文档级数据解决文档级机器翻译中数据稀缺和幻觉问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在机器翻译中表现不如传统编码器-解码器系统，但擅长建模上下文信息，适合文档级翻译任务。然而文档级MT面临两大挑战：1) 大规模高质量文档级平行数据稀缺；2) LLM在生成时容易产生幻觉和遗漏

Method: 提出两阶段微调策略：首先使用LLM将摘要数据转换为文档级平行数据，并通过sacreBLEU、COMET和LaBSE余弦相似度等多指标过滤以提高数据质量；然后进行两阶段微调：先在丰富的句子级MT资源上微调，再在过滤后的文档级语料上微调

Result: 未在摘要中明确说明具体实验结果，但方法旨在解决文档级MT的关键挑战

Conclusion: 通过LLM增强文档级数据和两阶段微调策略，可以有效解决文档级机器翻译中的数据稀缺和幻觉问题，提升LLM在文档级翻译任务中的性能

Abstract: In Machine Translation, Large Language Models (LLMs) have generally underperformed compared to conventional encoder-decoder systems and thus see limited adoption. However, LLMs excel at modeling contextual information, making them a natural fit for document-level translation tasks where coherence across sentences is crucial. Despite this potential, document-level MT with LLMs faces two key challenges: (1) the scarcity of large-scale, high-quality document-level parallel data; and (2) the propensity of LLMs to introduce hallucinations and omissions during generation. To address these challenges, we propose a two-stage fine-tuning strategy leveraging LLM-augmented document-level data. First, we augment data by converting summarization data into document-level parallel data using a LLM, and then filter it using multiple metrics, leveraging sacreBLEU, COMET, and LaBSE-based cosine similarity-to improve data quality. Finally, we employ a two-stage fine-tuning strategy: first fine-tuning on the abundant sentence-level MT resources, and then on the filtered document-level corpus.

</details>


### [339] [Gumbel Distillation for Parallel Text Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22216)
*Chi Zhang,Xixi Hu,Bo Liu,Qiang Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Gumbel Distillation：一种新颖的蒸馏技术，通过Gumbel-Max技巧让并行解码器从自回归教师模型学习token序列的联合分布，显著提升并行语言模型的生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归语言模型生成速度慢，而并行解码方法虽然速度快但生成质量较差，难以建模token序列的复杂联合分布。需要缩小这种性能差距。

Method: 提出Gumbel Distillation蒸馏技术，利用Gumbel-Max技巧创建从潜在Gumbel噪声空间到高性能自回归教师模型输出token的确定性映射。这是一种模型无关的技术，可与MDLM、BD3-LM等多种并行解码架构无缝集成。

Result: 在LM1B和OpenWebText数据集上的实验表明，Gumbel Distillation显著提升了并行语言模型的生成质量：在OpenWebText数据集上训练的MDLM，MAUVE分数提高了30.0%，生成困惑度降低了10.5%。

Conclusion: Gumbel Distillation是一种有效的蒸馏方法，能够帮助并行解码器学习token序列的复杂联合分布，显著缩小与自回归模型在生成质量上的差距。

Abstract: The slow, sequential nature of autoregressive (AR) language models has driven the adoption of parallel decoding methods. However, these non-AR models often sacrifice generation quality as they struggle to model the complex joint distribution of token sequences. To narrow this performance gap, we introduce Gumbel Distillation, a novel distillation technique that enables parallel decoders to learn this distribution effectively. Our method leverages the Gumbel-Max trick to create a deterministic mapping from a latent Gumbel noise space to the output tokens of a high-performing AR teacher. As a model-agnostic technique, Gumbel Distillation seamlessly integrates with diverse parallel decoding architectures, including MDLM and BD3-LM. Experiments on LM1B and OpenWebText show that Gumbel Distillation substantially improves the generation quality of parallel language models, achieving a 30.0% improvement in MAUVE score and 10.5% in generative perplexity over MDLM trained on OpenWebText dataset. Code available at https://github.com/hxixixh/gumbel-distill.

</details>


### [340] [Adapting Self-Supervised Speech Representations for Cross-lingual Dysarthria Detection in Parkinson's Disease](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22225)
*Abner Hernandez,Eunjung Yeo,Kwanghee Choi,Chin-Jou Li,Zhengjun Yue,Rohan Kumar Das,Jan Rusz,Mathew Magimai Doss,Juan Rafael Orozco-Arroyave,Tomás Arias-Vergara,Andreas Maier,Elmar Nöth,David R. Mortensen,David Harwath,Paula Andrea Perez-Toro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出表示层语言转换方法，通过质心向量适配将源语言自监督语音表示与目标语言分布对齐，改善跨语言构音障碍检测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构音障碍语音数据有限，跨语言检测具有挑战性。主要困难在于语音表示通常编码语言依赖结构，这会干扰构音障碍检测。

Method: 提出表示层语言转换方法，使用健康对照语音估计的质心向量适配，将源语言自监督语音表示与目标语言分布对齐

Result: 在捷克语、德语和西班牙语的帕金森病语音数据集上评估，LS显著提高跨语言设置的敏感性和F1分数，在多语言设置中也获得较小但一致的增益

Conclusion: 表示分析显示LS减少了嵌入空间中的语言身份，支持LS移除语言依赖结构的解释，有效改善跨语言构音障碍检测

Abstract: The limited availability of dysarthric speech data makes cross-lingual detection an important but challenging problem. A key difficulty is that speech representations often encode language-dependent structure that can confound dysarthria detection. We propose a representation-level language shift (LS) that aligns source-language self-supervised speech representations with the target-language distribution using centroid-based vector adaptation estimated from healthy-control speech. We evaluate the approach on oral DDK recordings from Parkinson's disease speech datasets in Czech, German, and Spanish under both cross-lingual and multilingual settings. LS substantially improves sensitivity and F1 in cross-lingual settings, while yielding smaller but consistent gains in multilingual settings. Representation analysis further shows that LS reduces language identity in the embedding space, supporting the interpretation that LS removes language-dependent structure.

</details>


### [341] [MemDLM: Memory-Enhanced DLM Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22241)
*Zehua Pei,Hui-Ling Zhen,Weizhe Lin,Sinno Jialin Pan,Yunhe Wang,Mingxuan Yuan,Bei Yu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MemDLM通过双层优化在训练中嵌入模拟去噪过程，使用参数记忆捕获局部轨迹经验，减少训练推理不匹配，提升收敛速度和长上下文理解能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散语言模型相比自回归模型具有并行解码和灵活生成的优势，但存在显著的训练-推理不匹配问题：训练使用静态单步掩码预测目标，而推理采用多步渐进去噪轨迹

Method: 提出MemDLM，通过双层优化在训练中嵌入模拟去噪过程。内循环更新快速权重形成参数记忆，捕获每个样本的局部轨迹经验；外循环基于该记忆更新基础模型。将记忆压力从token表示转移到参数

Result: MemDLM实现更快的收敛和更低的训练损失。推理时重新启用内循环作为适应步骤，在长上下文理解上获得额外提升。参数记忆在推理时表现为涌现的权重内检索机制，在Needle-in-a-Haystack检索任务上减少token级注意力瓶颈

Conclusion: MemDLM通过参数记忆和双层优化有效缓解扩散语言模型的训练-推理不匹配问题，提升模型性能和长上下文处理能力，同时展现出有趣的涌现检索特性

Abstract: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) offer attractive advantages over Auto-Regressive (AR) models, such as full-attention parallel decoding and flexible generation. However, they suffer from a notable train-inference mismatch: DLMs are trained with a static, single-step masked prediction objective, but deployed through a multi-step progressive denoising trajectory. We propose MemDLM (Memory-Enhanced DLM), which narrows this gap by embedding a simulated denoising process into training via Bi-level Optimization. An inner loop updates a set of fast weights, forming a Parametric Memory that captures the local trajectory experience of each sample, while an outer loop updates the base model conditioned on this memory. By offloading memorization pressure from token representations to parameters, MemDLM yields faster convergence and lower training loss. Moreover, the inner loop can be re-enabled at inference time as an adaptation step, yielding additional gains on long-context understanding. We find that, when activated at inference time, this Parametric Memory acts as an emergent in-weight retrieval mechanism, helping MemDLM further reduce token-level attention bottlenecks on challenging Needle-in-a-Haystack retrieval tasks. Code: https://github.com/JarvisPei/MemDLM.

</details>


### [342] [Greater accessibility can amplify discrimination in generative AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22260)
*Carolin Holtermann,Minh Duc Bui,Kaitlyn Zhou,Valentin Hofmann,Katharina von der Wense,Anne Lauscher*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 音频LLM存在系统性性别歧视，仅凭说话者声音就会产生性别刻板印象回应，比文本交互偏见更严重，而音高调节可作为缓解策略


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数百万人依赖LLM获取教育、工作和医疗，但这些模型会复制和放大训练数据中的社会偏见。文本界面对许多用户（如识字有限、运动障碍或仅使用移动设备者）构成障碍。语音交互有望提升可访问性，但语音携带身份线索，用户难以隐藏，引发担忧：可访问性提升是否以公平对待为代价？

Method: 研究音频LLM的性别歧视现象，通过语音输入测试模型响应；进行补充调查（n=1000）了解用户对属性推断的态度；探索音高操纵作为缓解策略

Result: 音频LLM表现出系统性性别歧视，仅凭说话者声音就向性别刻板印象形容词和职业偏移，偏见程度超过文本交互。调查显示不频繁用户最不愿接受未公开的属性推断，且当此类做法被揭露时最可能退出。音高操纵可系统性地调节性别歧视输出

Conclusion: 语音界面不仅将文本模型扩展到新模态，还引入了与副语言线索相关的独特偏见机制。AI发展中存在关键张力：通过语音界面扩展可访问性的努力同时创造了新的歧视途径，要求公平性和可访问性必须同时解决

Abstract: Hundreds of millions of people rely on large language models (LLMs) for education, work, and even healthcare. Yet these models are known to reproduce and amplify social biases present in their training data. Moreover, text-based interfaces remain a barrier for many, for example, users with limited literacy, motor impairments, or mobile-only devices. Voice interaction promises to expand accessibility, but unlike text, speech carries identity cues that users cannot easily mask, raising concerns about whether accessibility gains may come at the cost of equitable treatment. Here we show that audio-enabled LLMs exhibit systematic gender discrimination, shifting responses toward gender-stereotyped adjectives and occupations solely on the basis of speaker voice, and amplifying bias beyond that observed in text-based interaction. Thus, voice interfaces do not merely extend text models to a new modality but introduce distinct bias mechanisms tied to paralinguistic cues. Complementary survey evidence ($n=1,000$) shows that infrequent chatbot users are most hesitant to undisclosed attribute inference and most likely to disengage when such practices are revealed. To demonstrate a potential mitigation strategy, we show that pitch manipulation can systematically regulate gender-discriminatory outputs. Overall, our findings reveal a critical tension in AI development: efforts to expand accessibility through voice interfaces simultaneously create new pathways for discrimination, demanding that fairness and accessibility be addressed in tandem.

</details>


### [343] [TiCo: Time-Controllable Training for Spoken Dialogue Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22267)
*Kai-Wei Chang,Wei-Chih Chen,En-Pei Hu,Hung-yi Lee,James Glass*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TiCo是一种简单的后训练方法，让语音对话模型能够遵循时间约束指令并生成可控时长的响应，通过语音时间标记器帮助模型在生成过程中估计已用时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音对话模型虽然能生成自然的语音响应，但缺乏时间意识，难以遵循时长相关指令（如"请生成约15秒的响应"）。在语音助手等实际应用中，控制响应时长能提升交互质量。

Method: TiCo通过语音时间标记器（如<10.6秒>）让模型在生成过程中估计已用说话时间，帮助模型保持时间意识并调整剩余内容以满足目标时长。方法简单高效，仅需少量数据且无需额外问答对，依赖自生成和强化学习。

Result: 实验结果显示，TiCo显著提高了模型对时长约束的遵循能力，同时保持了响应质量。

Conclusion: TiCo有效解决了语音对话模型缺乏时间意识的问题，使其能够生成符合时长要求的响应，提升了语音交互系统的实用性。

Abstract: We propose TiCo, a simple post-training method for enabling spoken dialogue models (SDMs) to follow time-constrained instructions and generate responses with controllable duration. This capability is valuable for real-world spoken language systems such as voice assistants and interactive agents, where controlling response duration can improve interaction quality. However, despite their strong ability to generate natural spoken responses, existing models lack time awareness and struggle to follow duration-related instructions (e.g., "Please generate a response lasting about 15 seconds"). Through an empirical evaluation of both open-source and commercial SDMs, we show that they frequently fail to satisfy such time-control requirements. TiCo addresses this limitation by enabling models to estimate elapsed speaking time during generation through Spoken Time Markers (STM) (e.g., <10.6 seconds>). These markers help the model maintain awareness of time and adjust the remaining content to meet the target duration. TiCo is simple and efficient: it requires only a small amount of data and no additional question-answer pairs, relying instead on self-generation and reinforcement learning. Experimental results show that TiCo significantly improves adherence to duration constraints while preserving response quality.

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [344] [From Attention to Dialogue: Does Audience Engagement Reinforce Constructive Cross-Party Communication?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20549)
*Ahana Biswas,Yu-Ru Lin*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 研究发现社交媒体受众参与度能促进精英跨党派互动，形成良性反馈循环，挑战了社交媒体加剧两极分化的传统观点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注精英如何塑造大众意见，本文反向探讨社交媒体受众反应是否影响精英行为，特别是跨党派互动（CPIs）如何影响政治话语质量。

Method: 分析2020-2021年间美国州议员在Twitter/X上的110万次跨党派转推、回复和提及数据，建立参与度基准模式，并检验受众参与对后续精英行为的影响。

Result: 民主党在回复和提及中获得适度参与，共和党在直接跨党派互动中面临惩罚；受众参与形成反馈循环，促使议员更频繁参与跨党派对话并调整修辞策略，促进因果推理、主观语言和积极情绪表达。

Conclusion: 受众参与与精英间建设性跨党派话语呈正相关，挑战了社交媒体主要驱动极化加剧的简化解释，表明社交媒体平台也能促进更理性的政治对话。

Abstract: While existing works have emphasized how elites shape mass opinion, we ask whether the reverse also holds: do audience reactions on social media actively shape elite behavior? We examine this question through the lens of cross-partisan interactions (CPIs), which can either foster deliberation or deepen polarization. Using a dataset of over 1.1 million cross-party retweets, replies, and mentions between U.S. state legislators and their audiences on Twitter/X (2020-2021), we first establish baseline patterns of engagement: Democrats gain modest engagement in replies and mentions, while Republicans often face penalties in direct cross-party interactions. Building on this, we show that audience engagement produces a feedback loop that conditions future elite behavior. Following highly visible CPIs, legislators are not only more likely to engage again in cross-talk, but also shift their rhetorical strategies. Engagement consistently promotes causal reasoning, subjective language, and positive-emotion framing in subsequent CPIs. These findings suggest a positive association between audience engagement and constructive cross-party discourse among elites, challenging overly simplified interpretations in the literature that emphasize social media as a primary driver of rising or falling polarization.

</details>


### [345] [The Art of Midwifery in LLMs: Optimizing Role Personas for Large Language Models as Moral Assistants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20626)
*Yangyi Wu,Tianqi Wang,Xilin Liu*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 该研究提出LLM应作为"道德助手"而非独立"道德代理"，通过赋予不同人格原型在道德场景中对话，发现最优表现具有情境依赖性，并引入"建设性分歧"概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要将AI视为遵循"人机对齐"范式的独立"道德代理"，但作者认为AI应作为"道德助手"，通过"助产术"促进用户的道德成长，而非替代人类判断。

Method: 赋予LLM不同的人格原型（如美德典范、守护天使、苏格拉底式人格），在六个道德场景中进行对话实验，分析不同人格在不同情境下的表现。

Result: 虽然美德典范整体表现最佳，但最优表现具有情境依赖性：守护天使在生物伦理危机中提供情感支持更优，而苏格拉底式人格在存在困境中更能引发反思。

Conclusion: 提出"建设性分歧"概念，认为AI应在关键时刻提供替代视角而非盲目适应用户，超越传统对齐范式，作为促进道德成长的助手而非替代者。

Abstract: With the development of Large Language Models (LLMs) in consulting, their role in moral decision-making has become prominent. However, existing research predominantly consider AI as an independent "moral agent" adhering to the "Human-AI Alignment" paradigm. In this study, we propose that AI should serve as a "moral assistant", facilitating users' moral growth through the "Art of Midwifery" rather than substituting human judgment. We endow LLMs with distinct persona archetypes and conducted dialogues across six moral scenarios. Findings reveal that while the virtue exemplar excelled overall, optimal performance was context-dependent: the Guardian Angel excelled in bioethical crises for emotional support, whereas the Socratic persona better elicited reflection in existential dilemmas. We introduce "Constructive Divergence", arguing that AI should offer alternative perspectives at critical moment rather than blindly accommodate users, transcending traditional alignment paradigms.

</details>


### [346] [negMIX: Negative Mixup for OOD Generalization in Open-Set Node Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20798)
*Junwei Gong,Xiao Shen,Zhihao Chen,Shirui Pan,Xiao Wang,Xi Zhou*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 提出negMIX模型，通过负Mixup增强OOD泛化能力，结合跨层图对比学习提升类内紧凑性和类间分离性，在开放集节点分类任务中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放集节点分类(OSNC)中，现有方法在增强对未见类(OOD)节点的泛化能力，以及提升类内紧凑性和类间分离性方面存在不足。需要解决这两个关键挑战。

Method: 提出negMIX模型：1) 针对开放集场景设计负Mixup方法，增强模型对OOD节点的泛化能力并产生更清晰的ID/OOD边界；2) 开发跨层图对比学习模块，最大化不同拓扑距离邻域中同类节点的原型互信息，促进类内紧凑性和类间分离性。

Result: 大量实验验证了negMIX在各种场景和设置下显著优于最先进的方法。

Conclusion: negMIX通过负Mixup和跨层图对比学习有效解决了开放集节点分类中的泛化能力和类结构优化问题，为OSNC任务提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Open-set node classification (OSNC) allows unlabeled test data to contain novel classes previously unseen in the labeled data. The goal is to classify in-distribution (ID) nodes into corresponding known classes and reject out-of-distribution (OOD) nodes as unknown class. Despite recent notable progress in OSNC, two challenges remain less explored, i.e., how to enhance generalization to OOD nodes, and promote intra-class compactness and inter-class separability. To tackle such challenges, we propose a novel Negative Mixup with Cross-Layer Graph Contrastive Learning (negMIX) model. Firstly, we devise a novel negative Mixup method purposefully crafted for the open-set scenario with theoretical justification, to enhance the model's generalization to OOD nodes and yield clearer ID/OOD boundary. Additionally, a unique cross-layer graph contrastive learning module is developed to maximize the prototypical mutual information between the same class nodes across different topological distance neighborhoods, thereby facilitating intra-class compactness and inter-class separability. Extensive experiments validate significant outperformance of the proposed negMIX over state-of-the-art methods in various scenarios and settings.

</details>


### [347] [Scaling laws in empirical networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20973)
*Upasana Dutta,Alexander Ray,Aaron Clauset*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 研究发现真实网络在不同科学领域中都遵循一致的缩放规律，配置模型随机图能很好地解释这些规律，揭示了随机性在网络大规模结构形成中的重要作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然随机图模型为网络结构随规模变化的"缩放行为"提供了一些预期，但人们对实证网络结构如何随网络规模缩放，以及随机图模型对这些实证模式的解释能力了解相对较少。

Method: 使用来自四个科学领域的大型、结构多样的网络语料库，首先表征真实网络的实证缩放规律，考虑平均度、传递性、平均测地距离和度同配性如何随网络规模变化。然后评估三种具有不同结构假设的随机图模型对这些实证缩放规律的解释程度。

Result: 来自四个科学领域的所有网络在这些网络结构度量上都表现出一致的缩放规律，但缩放速率不同。配置模型随机图是网络缩放行为的极好模型，尽管具有模块化结构的零模型稍好一些。

Conclusion: 这些发现识别了复杂系统网络结构中的一组新模式，为网络结构模型提供了新的验证目标，并揭示了随机性在塑造网络大规模结构中的新作用。

Abstract: How does the shape of a network change as its size increases? Although random graph models provide some expectations for such "scaling behaviors" in the structure of networks, relatively little is known about how empirical network structure scales with network size or how well random graphs explain those empirical patterns. Using a large, structurally diverse corpus of networks from four scientific domains, we first characterize the empirical scaling laws of real-world networks, considering how mean degree, transitivity, mean geodesic distance, and degree assortativity vary with network size. We show that networks from all four scientific domains exhibit a consistent set of scaling laws on these measures of network structure, but with differing scaling rates. We then assess the extent to which these empirical scaling laws are explained by three random graph models with different structural assumptions, showing that configuration model random graphs are a remarkably good model of network scaling behavior, although null models with modular structure are slightly better. These findings identify a new set of common patterns in the network structure of complex systems, provide new validation targets for models of network structure, and shed new light on the role of randomness in shaping the large-scale structure of networks.

</details>


### [348] [Empirical Evaluation of Link Deletion Methods for Limiting Information Diffusion on Social Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21470)
*Shiori Furukawa,Sho Tsugawa*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 研究评估了社交网络中删除链接方法对抑制有害信息传播的效果，发现即使删除10%-50%的链接，传播规模最多只能减少50%，且存在大量多源用户传播，使链接删除方法效率有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交媒体上虚假新闻等有害信息传播已成为严重问题，虽然已有研究通过删除社交网络链接来限制信息扩散，但这些方法主要基于合成扩散模型进行评估，需要在实际传播日志上验证其有效性。

Method: 使用实际的推特转发传播日志（而非合成扩散模型）来评估链接删除方法的有效性，分析删除10%-50%链接后信息传播规模的变化。

Result: 即使在最乐观的估计下，删除10%-50%链接后，传播规模最多只能减少到原来的50%。此外，存在大量具有多个源用户的传播链，这使得链接删除方法效率低下。

Conclusion: 链接删除策略在抑制信息传播方面的效果有限，特别是在存在多源用户传播的情况下，需要开发更有效的干预方法来应对有害信息扩散问题。

Abstract: Although beneficial information abounds on social media, the dissemination of harmful information such as so-called ``fake news'' has become a serious issue. Therefore, many researchers have devoted considerable effort to limiting the diffusion of harmful information. A promising approach to limiting diffusion of such information is link deletion methods in social networks. Link deletion methods have been shown to be effective in reducing the size of information diffusion cascades generated by synthetic models on a given social network. In this study, we evaluate the effectiveness of link deletion methods by using actual logs of retweet cascades, rather than by using synthetic diffusion models. Our results show that even after deleting 10\%--50\% of links from a social network, the size of cascades after link deletion is estimated to be only 50\% the original size under the optimistic estimation, which suggests that the effectiveness of the link deletion strategy for suppressing information diffusion is limited. Moreover, our results also show that there is a considerable number of cascades with many seed users, which renders link deletion methods inefficient.

</details>


### [349] [Learning Inflation Narratives from Reddit: How Lightweight LLMs Reveal Forward-Looking Economic Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21501)
*Ryuichi Saito,Sho Tsugawa*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 使用轻量级LLM分析Reddit数据，创建与CPI高度相关(r=0.91)的社交媒体通胀指标，能提前预测传统通胀指标变化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统通胀预期测量依赖低频调查，缺乏叙事洞察和行业细节。需要更实时、细粒度的公众通胀感知测量方法

Method: 使用轻量级大语言模型，基于美国CPI成分相关的Reddit数据微调，创建通胀分类器，分析2012-2022年Reddit讨论，生成月度Reddit通胀分数(RIS)

Result: 微调轻量级LLM在小数据集表现良好；RIS与CPI高度相关(r=0.91)，与密歇根通胀预期一致；格兰杰因果检验显示RIS领先CPI和MICH变化；变化点和词汇分析揭示食品杂货、交通、住房等行业通胀叙事变化

Conclusion: 基于NLP的社交媒体通胀指标能补充传统经济指标，提供更早的通胀压力检测和政策响应时机，揭示聚合价格指数无法直接观察的通胀关注维度

Abstract: Public perceptions and expectations of inflation shape household spending, wage bargaining, and policy support, making them key determinants of macroeconomic outcomes. However, current measures rely on infrequent surveys and offer limited insight into underlying narratives and sector-specific concerns. This paper presents a novel approach to measuring public perception of inflation, using lightweight large language models (LLMs) fine-tuned on domain-specific Reddit data. We created an inflation classifier trained on posts related to components of the U.S. Consumer Price Index (CPI). When applied to more than 10 years of Reddit discussions (2012-2022), this classifier produces monthly Reddit inflation scores (RIS), which we validated against actual economic indicators. Our results show that fine-tuned lightweight LLMs perform well even with smaller training datasets, and the Reddit inflation scores strongly correlate with CPI (r=0.91) and closely align with the University of Michigan: Inflation Expectation (MICH). Importantly, Granger causality tests suggested that social media-based inflation scores often precede movements in both CPI and MICH, indicating their potential as predictive, forward-looking economic signals. Furthermore, change-point and lexical analyses uncovered shifts in inflation-related narratives across sectors like groceries, transportation, and housing, revealing dimensions of inflation concern that are not directly observable in aggregate price indices. By complementing traditional economic indicators with narrative-rich signals, this study demonstrates how NLP-based measures can facilitate earlier detection of inflationary pressures and policy responses.

</details>


### [350] [Asymmetric Dynamics of Partisan Warriors in YouTube Comments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21776)
*Keyeun Lee,Sang Jung Kim*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 研究发现社交媒体跨意识形态评论并未促进文明讨论，反而催生"党派战士"现象，保守派观众更倾向奖励对异见者的攻击，且这种现象在保守派频道更普遍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究旨在解释社交媒体跨意识形态评论的悖论：理论上应促进审议，现实中却常加剧敌意。通过分析2024年美国第二次总统辩论的YouTube评论，探究跨党派攻击行为及其驱动因素。

Method: 分析185万条YouTube评论，使用毒性过滤和活跃参与筛选，运用大语言模型识别攻击目标，操作化"党派战士"行为概念，通过四个研究问题系统分析跨意识形态评论动态。

Result: 1)跨意识形态评论者并不比同阵营评论者更文明；2)保守派观众倾向于奖励对异见领导人的攻击，而自由派观众无类似激励甚至惩罚此类攻击；3)党派战士在保守派频道更普遍；4)该现象主要由频道层面异质性驱动而非视频标题的短暂反应。

Conclusion: 研究将关注点从不文明行为的普遍性转向其目标、奖励和结构驱动因素，揭示了在线空间中党派敌意如何被实施和维持，挑战了跨意识形态接触促进审议的假设。

Abstract: Cross-cutting commenting on social media is often imagined as a path to deliberation, yet exposure to opposing views frequently fuels hostility. To explain this dynamic, we introduce the concept of partisan warriors--commenters who cross ideological lines primarily to launch uncivil attacks against out-partisans. We analyze a large corpus of YouTube comments (N= 1,854,320) surrounding the 2024 U.S. second presidential debate. After filtering for toxicity and active participation, we use large language models to identify attack targets and operationalize partisan warrior behavior. Our analysis highlights four dynamics. First, cross-cutting commenters do not exhibit greater civility than those who remain within their ideological camps (RQ1). Second, audience reactions diverge by ideology: conservative audiences tended to reward hostile attacks on out-group leaders, whereas liberal audiences offered no comparable incentives and at times penalized such attacks (RQ2). Third, partisan warriors are notably more prevalent in conservative-leaning channels than in liberal ones; commenters restricted to conservative spaces were substantially more likely to engage in partisan warrior behavior compared to their liberal-only counterparts (RQ3). Finally, regarding environmental triggers, robustness checks suggest that this participation is an ecological phenomenon driven largely by channel-level heterogeneity rather than transient responses to individual video titles (RQ4). By shifting attention from the prevalence of incivility to its targets, rewards, and structural drivers, this study advances understanding of how partisan hostility is enacted and sustained in online spaces.

</details>


### [351] [Investigating and Comparing Discussion Topics in Multilingual Underground Forums](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21849)
*Mariella Mischinger,Vahid Ghafouri,Sergio Pastrana,Guillermo Suarez-Tangil*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无监督方法，通过语义聚类分析俄英双语犯罪论坛中的话题，揭示语言障碍如何形成具有不同知识和动机的子社区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地下犯罪论坛在犯罪生态系统中扮演重要角色，但语言障碍（混合语言或社区特定俚语）给分析带来挑战。理解这些论坛中网络犯罪分子的技能、动机、关注点和操作方式，有助于网络安全专业人员和执法部门更好地了解其策略、评估社会风险并制定更有效的对策。

Method: 采用无监督方法组合，将语义相关的对话主题（话题）聚类分组。该方法应用于分析一个运营超过18年的邀请制俄英双语犯罪论坛，通过语义聚类识别知识孤岛和暗黑俚语的语义含义。

Result: 揭示了语言障碍如何创建具有不同知识和动机的子社区：某些知识仅在使用特定语言（如俄语）的子社区中共享，不会说该语言的用户无法获取。方法还能从上下文中识别暗黑俚语的语义含义。

Conclusion: 提出的无监督方法能有效分析多语言犯罪论坛，揭示语言障碍导致的子社区分化现象。该方法还可用于识别暗黑俚语语义，并具有其他潜在应用价值，为网络安全分析和执法工作提供新工具。

Abstract: Underground forums play a crucial role in the criminal ecosystem, facilitating the exchange of knowledge and the trade of illegal tools and services. By analyzing the skills, motivations, focus, and operations of cyber-criminals active in these forums, cybersecurity professionals and law enforcement can better understand their tactics, assess the risks they pose to society, and develop more effective countermeasures. A significant challenge in analyzing these forums arises from language barriers, either because they blend different languages or because they use community-specific slang.
  In this paper, we address this challenge through the use of a combination of unsupervised methods that group together semantically related conversational themes (i.e., topics) into clusters. We apply our methodology to analyze a prolific, invite-only, Russian-English criminal forum that has been operating for over 18 years. This way, we uncover pockets of knowledge, i.e., knowledge only shared in one sub-community. This knowledge is accessible only to those speaking a language (e.g., Russian), thereby showing that language barriers (e.g., for users that do not speak Russian) can create sub-communities with different knowledge and motivations. We further demonstrate how our method can identify the semantic meaning of dark jargon from its context, and discuss other potential applications of our approach.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [352] [HCAG: Hierarchical Abstraction and Retrieval-Augmented Generation on Theoretical Repositories with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20299)
*Yusen Wu,Xiaotie Deng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: HCAG框架通过分层抽象和检索增强生成，解决复杂理论驱动代码库（如算法博弈论）中高层架构模式和跨文件依赖的捕获问题，显著提升代码质量和架构一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于检索增强生成的代码生成方法难以捕捉复杂理论驱动代码库中的高层架构模式和跨文件依赖，导致抽象概念与可执行实现之间存在语义和结构鸿沟。

Method: HCAG采用两阶段设计：1) 离线分层抽象阶段，递归解析代码库和对齐的理论文本，构建连接理论、架构和实现的多分辨率语义知识库；2) 在线分层检索和支架生成阶段，执行自顶向下、层级式检索，引导LLM按架构-模块范式生成代码，并集成多智能体讨论机制。

Result: 在多样化博弈论系统生成任务上的实验表明，HCAG在代码质量、架构一致性和需求通过率方面显著优于代表性仓库级方法，并创建了大规模对齐的理论-实现数据集，能有效增强领域特定LLM。

Conclusion: HCAG为从结构化代码库中挖掘、重用和生成复杂系统提供了通用蓝图，虽然以算法博弈论为演示领域，但可推广到其他领域。

Abstract: Existing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) methods for code struggle to capture the high-level architectural patterns and cross-file dependencies inherent in complex, theory-driven codebases, such as those in algorithmic game theory (AGT), leading to a persistent semantic and structural gap between abstract concepts and executable implementations. To address this challenge, we propose Hierarchical Code/Architecture-guided Agent Generation (HCAG), a framework that reformulates repository-level code generation as a structured, planning-oriented process over hierarchical knowledge. HCAG adopts a two-phase design: an offline hierarchical abstraction phase that recursively parses code repositories and aligned theoretical texts to construct a multi-resolution semantic knowledge base explicitly linking theory, architecture, and implementation; and an online hierarchical retrieval and scaffolded generation phase that performs top-down, level-wise retrieval to guide LLMs in an architecture-then-module generation paradigm. To further improve robustness and consistency, HCAG integrates a multi-agent discussion inspired by cooperative game. We provide a theoretical analysis showing that hierarchical abstraction with adaptive node compression achieves cost-optimality compared to flat and iterative RAG baselines. Extensive experiments on diverse game-theoretic system generation tasks demonstrate that HCAG substantially outperforms representative repository-level methods in code quality, architectural coherence, and requirement pass rate. In addition, HCAG produces a large-scale, aligned theory-implementation dataset that effectively enhances domain-specific LLMs through post-training. Although demonstrated in AGT, HCAG paradigm also offers a general blueprint for mining, reusing, and generating complex systems from structured codebases in other domains.

</details>


### [353] [From Human Interfaces to Agent Interfaces: Rethinking Software Design in the Age of AI-Native Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20300)
*Shaolin Wang,Yi Mei,Haoyang Che,He Jiang,Shui Yu,Ying Gu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 软件工程正从面向人类的界面设计转向面向AI代理的调用系统，提出了"代理接口"和"可调用能力"作为AI原生软件的基础构件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统软件系统主要为人类交互设计，但随着LLM代理的发展，软件越来越多地被AI代理自主调用，这需要新的软件设计范式。

Method: 形式化"代理接口"概念，引入"可调用能力"作为AI导向软件的基本构建块，提出机器可解释性、可组合性和调用可靠性等设计原则。

Result: 提出了从单体应用向能力基系统转变的架构和组织影响，为AI原生软件设计提供了概念基础。

Conclusion: 软件工程正在经历从人类导向界面到代理导向调用系统的范式转变，需要重新思考软件设计和架构以适应AI代理的自主调用。

Abstract: Software systems have traditionally been designed for human interaction, emphasizing graphical user interfaces, usability, and cognitive alignment with end users. However, recent advances in large language model (LLM)-based agents are changing the primary consumers of software systems. Increasingly, software is no longer only used by humans, but also invoked autonomously by AI agents through structured interfaces. In this paper, we argue that software engineering is undergoing a paradigm shift from human-oriented interfaces to agent-oriented invocation systems. We formalize the notion of agent interfaces, introduce invocable capabilities as the fundamental building blocks of AI-oriented software, and outline design principles for such systems, including machine interpretability, composability, and invocation reliability. We then discuss architectural and organizational implications of this shift, highlighting a transition from monolithic applications to capability-based systems that can be dynamically composed by AI agents. The paper aims to provide a conceptual foundation for the emerging paradigm of AI-native software design.

</details>


### [354] [kRAIG: A Natural Language-Driven Agent for Automated DataOps Pipeline Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20311)
*Rohan Siva,Kai Cheung,Lichi Li,Ganesh Sundaram*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: kRAIG是一个AI代理，可将自然语言规范转换为生产就绪的Kubeflow Pipelines，通过ReQuesAct交互框架澄清用户意图，实现端到端数据工程工作流自动化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代机器学习系统依赖复杂的数据工程工作流，但构建这些管道耗时且需要专业知识。现有LLM代理方法存在用户意图不明确、工具生成不可靠、可执行输出有限等问题。

Method: 提出kRAIG系统，采用ReQuesAct（推理、提问、行动）交互框架澄清用户意图，通过检索增强的工具合成过程生成任务特定转换组件，并包含LLM验证阶段确保数据质量和安全性。

Result: 相比最先进的代理基线，提取和加载成功率提高3倍，转换准确率提高25%，表明结构化代理工作流能显著提升自动化数据工程管道的可靠性和可执行性。

Conclusion: 具有明确意图澄清和验证的结构化代理工作流能显著增强自动化数据工程管道的可靠性和可执行性，为数据工程工作流自动化提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Modern machine learning systems rely on complex data engineering workflows to extract, transform, and load (ELT) data into production pipelines. However, constructing these pipelines remains time-consuming and requires substantial expertise in data infrastructure and orchestration frameworks. Recent advances in large language model (LLM) agents offer a potential path toward automating these workflows, but existing approaches struggle with under-specified user intent, unreliable tool generation, and limited guarantees of executable outputs.
  We introduce kRAIG, an AI agent that translates natural language specifications into production-ready Kubeflow Pipelines (KFP). To resolve ambiguity in user intent, we propose ReQuesAct (Reason, Question, Act), an interaction framework that explicitly clarifies intent prior to pipeline synthesis. The system orchestrates end-to-end data movement from diverse sources and generates task-specific transformation components through a retrieval-augmented tool synthesis process. To ensure data quality and safety, kRAIG incorporates LLM-based validation stages that verify pipeline integrity prior to execution.
  Our framework achieves a 3x improvement in extraction and loading success and a 25 percent increase in transformation accuracy compared to state-of-the-art agentic baselines. These improvements demonstrate that structured agent workflows with explicit intent clarification and validation significantly enhance the reliability and executability of automated data engineering pipelines.

</details>


### [355] [Semantic Tool Discovery for Large Language Models: A Vector-Based Approach to MCP Tool Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20313)
*Sarat Mudunuri,Jian Wan,Ally Qin,Srinivasan Manoharan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出基于语义向量检索的MCP工具发现架构，通过动态选择最相关工具（3-5个）而非暴露全部工具（50-100+），显著降低token开销并保持高准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM工具调用实现面临扩展性挑战：将所有可用工具提供给LLM上下文会导致大量token开销、成本增加、准确性下降和上下文窗口限制。需要更智能的工具发现机制。

Method: 采用基于密集嵌入的语义工具发现架构：1）使用向量嵌入索引MCP工具以捕捉工具能力与用户意图的语义关系；2）基于查询-工具相似度的动态工具选择算法；3）支持多智能体和跨组织工具发现的扩展性设计。

Result: 实验显示：工具相关token消耗减少99.6%，在K=3时命中率达97.1%，MRR为0.91（基于5个MCP服务器的121个工具的140个查询基准测试），检索延迟低于100ms。

Conclusion: 提出的语义工具发现架构能有效解决MCP工具扩展性问题，显著提高效率并保持高准确性，为多智能体和跨组织工具发现提供了可扩展框架。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) with tool-calling capabilities have demonstrated remarkable potential in executing complex tasks through external tool integration. The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has emerged as a standardized framework for connecting LLMs to diverse toolsets, with individual MCP servers potentially exposing dozens to hundreds of tools. However, current implementations face a critical scalability challenge: providing all available tools to the LLM context results in substantial token overhead, increased costs, reduced accuracy, and context window constraints.
  We present a semantic tool discovery architecture that addresses these challenges through vector-based retrieval. Our approach indexes MCP tools using dense embeddings that capture semantic relationships between tool capabilities and user intent, dynamically selecting only the most relevant tools (typically 3-5) rather than exposing the entire tool catalog (50-100+).
  Experimental results demonstrate a 99.6% reduction in tool-related token consumption with a hit rate of 97.1% at K=3 and an MRR of 0.91 on a benchmark of 140 queries across 121 tools from 5 MCP servers, with sub-100ms retrieval latency. Contributions include: (1) a semantic indexing framework for MCP tools, (2) a dynamic tool selection algorithm based on query-tool similarity, (3) comprehensive evaluation demonstrating significant efficiency and accuracy improvements, and (4) extensibility to multi-agent and cross-organizational tool discovery.

</details>


### [356] [The Causal Impact of Tool Affordance on Safety Alignment in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20320)
*Shasha Yu,Fiona Carroll,Barry L. Bentley*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 工具访问显著破坏LLM安全对齐：文本模式下完美合规的模型在获得工具执行能力后，安全违规率飙升至85%，表明文本评估不足以评估智能体系统安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM安全评估主要基于文本内容，假设合规语言意味着安全行为，但这一假设在模型获得工具执行能力后变得不可靠。需要实证研究工具访问如何改变LLM智能体的安全对齐。

Method: 采用配对评估框架，在相同的提示和策略下，比较纯文本聊天机器人行为与工具使能智能体行为。实验在具有二元安全约束的确定性金融交易环境中进行，涵盖1500个程序生成的场景。通过双重执行机制（阻止或允许不安全操作）区分意图违规与实际违规。

Result: 两个评估模型在纯文本设置下保持完美合规，但引入工具访问后违规率急剧上升，最高达85%（规则未变）。尝试违规与实际执行违规存在显著差距，表明外部防护可以抑制可见危害但掩盖持续的不对齐。智能体在没有对抗提示的情况下自发发展约束规避策略。

Conclusion: 工具可访问性是安全不对齐的主要驱动因素，仅基于文本的评估不足以评估智能体系统。需要开发专门针对工具使能智能体的安全评估方法，并考虑意图与结果之间的差距。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as agents with access to executable tools, enabling direct interaction with external systems. However, most safety evaluations remain text-centric and assume that compliant language implies safe behavior, an assumption that becomes unreliable once models are allowed to act. In this work, we empirically examine how executable tool affordance alters safety alignment in LLM agents using a paired evaluation framework that compares text-only chatbot behavior with tool-enabled agent behavior under identical prompts and policies. Experiments are conducted in a deterministic financial transaction environment with binary safety constraints across 1,500 procedurally generated scenarios. To separate intent from outcome, we distinguish between attempted and realized violations using dual enforcement regimes that either block or permit unsafe actions. Both evaluated models maintain perfect compliance in text-only settings, yet exhibit sharp increases in violations after tool access is introduced, reaching rates up to 85% despite unchanged rules. We observe substantial gaps between attempted and executed violations, indicating that external guardrails can suppress visible harm while masking persistent misalignment. Agents also develop spontaneous constraint circumvention strategies without adversarial prompting. These results demonstrate that tool affordance acts as a primary driver of safety misalignment and that text-based evaluation alone is insufficient for assessing agentic systems.

</details>


### [357] [Procedural Refinement by LLM-driven Algorithmic Debugging for ARC-AGI-2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20334)
*Yu-Ning Qiu,Lin-Feng Zou,Jiong-Da Wang,Xue-Rong Yuan,Wang-Zhou Dai*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出ABPR方法，将LLM与元解释器结合，通过算法程序调试理论实现程序修复，在ARC-AGI-2基准上取得显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于对话的LLM代码修复在复杂代码生成任务中能力有限，主要依赖"合理推理"而非形式化的调试过程。算法程序调试理论为程序修复提供了形式化基础，但需要与LLM结合。

Method: 提出ABPR方法：将LLM与元解释器耦合，将程序执行物化为紧凑的声明式树结构追踪，遵循算法程序调试原则。采用Prolog作为目标语言，因其声明式语义适合算法程序调试。

Result: 在需要强抽象和调试能力的ARC-AGI-2基准上，ABPR与Gemini-3-Flash配合实现了56.67%的Pass@2分数，即使在LLM通常表现不佳的语言中也能取得良好效果。

Conclusion: ABPR通过将LLM与经典形式化方法结合，为程序修复提供了更可审计的范式，展示了神经符号程序细化的潜力。

Abstract: In complex code-generation tasks, conversation-based LLM code repair exhibits limited ability to recover from first-pass programming errors, as such code  revisions are usually driven by LLMs' "plausible reasoning" rather than a formal, algorithmic debugging procedure. However, a formal foundation for such debugging exists in Udi Shapiro's theory of algorithmic program debugging (APD), which frames program repair as an explicit, stepwise procedural refinement process. In this paper, we propose a neuro-symbolic procedural refinement approach, Abduction-Based Procedural Refinement (ABPR), which couples an LLM with a meta-interpreter that materialises program execution into compact, declarative tree-structured traces, following the principles of APD. We evaluate ABPR on ARC-AGI-2, a benchmark requiring strong abstraction and debugging capabilities, and adopt Prolog as the target language due to its declarative semantics, which are well-suited to algorithmic program debugging. Our experiments show that ABPR paired with Gemini-3-Flash achieves a Pass@2 score of 56.67\% even in a language in which contemporary LLMs typically underperform. These results point towards a more auditable paradigm for program repair by integrating LLMs with classical formal methods.

</details>


### [358] [ContractSkill: Repairable Contract-Based Skills for Multimodal Web Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20340)
*Zijian Lu,Yiping Zuo,Yupeng Nie,Xin He,Weibei Fan,Chen Dai*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ContractSkill框架将草稿技能转换为具有明确前提条件、步骤规范、后置条件、恢复规则和终止检查的可执行契约，实现确定性验证、步骤级故障定位和最小化补丁修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态GUI代理中可重用技能获取困难，因为按需生成的技能通常隐含动作语义、状态假设和成功标准，导致执行错误时脆弱、难以验证和修复。

Method: 将草稿技能转换为契约化可执行工件，包含明确的前提条件、步骤规范、后置条件、恢复规则和终止检查，支持确定性验证、步骤级故障定位和最小化补丁修复。

Result: 在VisualWebArena上，技能成功率从9.4%和10.9%提升到28.1%和37.5%；在MiniWoB上从66.5%和60.5%提升到77.5%和81.0%。修复后的工件可跨模型迁移，分别提升目标模型基线达47.8点和12.8点。

Conclusion: 代理技能应被视为显式的程序化工件，能够进行验证、修复和跨模型共享，契约化表示将技能精炼转化为局部化编辑而非完全重新生成。

Abstract: Despite rapid progress in multimodal GUI agents, reusable skill acquisition remains difficult because on-demand generated skills often leave action semantics, state assumptions, and success criteria implicit. This makes them brittle to execution errors, hard to verify, and difficult to repair. We present ContractSkill, a framework that converts a draft skill into a contracted executable artifact with explicit preconditions, step specifications, postconditions, recovery rules, and termination checks. This representation enables deterministic verification, step-level fault localization, and minimal patch-based repair, turning skill refinement into localized editing rather than full regeneration. Experiments on VisualWebArena and MiniWoB with GLM-4.6V and Qwen3.5-Plus show that ContractSkill improves self-generated skills from 9.4% and 10.9% to 28.1% and 37.5% on VisualWebArena, and from 66.5% and 60.5% to 77.5% and 81.0% on MiniWoB. Repaired artifacts also transfer across models, improving the target model's self-generated-skill baseline by up to 47.8 points and 12.8 points on the two benchmarks, respectively. These results suggest that agent skills are better treated as explicit procedural artifacts that can be verified, repaired, and shared across models.

</details>


### [359] [Beyond LLM-based test automation: A Zero-Cost Self-Healing Approach Using DOM Accessibility Tree Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20358)
*Renjith Nelson Joseph*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出零成本自修复测试自动化框架，用结构化可访问性树提取算法替代LLM，实现100%通过率且无API成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于CSS选择器、XPath和文本标签的UI定位器脆弱易失效，而基于LLM的自修复方法API成本过高，不适合企业级规模应用

Method: 采用十级优先级排序的定位器层次结构（get_by_role、data-testid、ARIA标签、CSS类片段、可见文本等），通过一次性DOM提取获取稳健选择器，失败时仅重新提取损坏的选择器而非全量发现

Result: 在automationexercise.com上验证，覆盖3种设备配置和10个业务流程测试，31个测试组合100%通过，总执行时间22秒，自修复能在1秒内检测并重新发现失效选择器

Conclusion: 该框架实现了零API成本的自修复测试自动化，可扩展到300+测试用例，解决了现有方法脆弱性和高成本的问题

Abstract: Modern web test automation frameworks rely heavily on CSS selectors, XPath expressions, and visible text labels to locate UI elements. These locators are inherently brittle -- when web applications update their DOM structure or class names, test suites fail at scale. Existing self-healing approaches increasingly delegate element discovery to Large Language Models (LLMs), introducing per-run API costs that become prohibitive at enterprise scale. This paper presents a zero-cost self-healing test automation framework that replaces LLM-based discovery with a structured accessibility tree extraction algorithm. The framework employs a ten-tier priority-ranked locator hierarchy -- get_by_role (W3C standard), data-testid, ARIA labels, CSS class fragments, visible text -- to discover robust selectors from a live DOM in a single one-time pass. A self-healing mechanism re-extracts only broken selectors upon failure, rather than re-running full discovery. The framework is validated against automationexercise.com across three device profiles (Desktop Chrome, Desktop Safari, iPhone 15) and ten business process test workflows under a three-tier hierarchy (L0: Domain, L1: Process, L2: Feature). Results demonstrate a 31/31 (100%) pass rate across 31 test combinations with total execution time of 22 seconds under parallel execution. Self-healing is empirically demonstrated: a stale selector is detected and re-discovered in under 1 second with zero human intervention. The framework scales to 300+ test cases with zero ongoing API cost.

</details>


### [360] [The Nature of Technical Debt in Research Software](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20415)
*Neil A. Ernst,Ahmed Musa Awon,Swapnil Hingmire,Ze Shi Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究软件技术债务的多方法研究：通过分析28k代码注释和访谈，识别了研究软件特有的9种自认技术债务类型和4个影响因素主题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究软件对科学发展至关重要，但技术债务问题会影响其可靠性、可维护性和科学有效性。目前对研究软件技术债务的范围、形式和开发团队对其的看法缺乏深入研究。

Method: 采用多方法研究：1) 分析9个研究软件项目的28,000个代码注释中的自认技术债务；2) 基于发现访谈研究软件工程师和科学家，了解技术债务的表现形式及其对研究软件和成果的影响。

Result: 识别了研究软件特有的9种自认技术债务类型，以及影响这些技术债务的4个主题因素。

Conclusion: 研究软件存在独特的技术债务形式，需要科学界和软件工程领域的专业知识共同应对。该研究为理解和管理研究软件技术债务提供了重要见解。

Abstract: Research software (also called scientific software) is essential for advancing scientific endeavours. Research software encapsulates complex algorithms and domain-specific knowledge and is a fundamental component of all science. A pervasive challenge in developing research software is technical debt, which can adversely affect reliability, maintainability, and scientific validity. Research software often relies on the initiative of the scientific community for maintenance, requiring diverse expertise in both scientific and software engineering domains. The extent and nature of technical debt in research software are little studied, in particular, what forms it takes, and what the science teams developing this software think about their technical debt. In this paper we describe our multi-method study examining technical debt in research software. We begin by examining instances of self-reported technical debt in research code, examining 28k code comments across nine research software projects. Then, building on our findings, we interview research software engineers and scientists about how this technical debt manifests itself in their experience, and what costs it has for research software and research outputs more generally. We identify nine types of self-admitted technical debt unique to research software, and four themes impacting this technical debt.

</details>


### [361] [yProv4DV: Reproducible Data Visualization Scripts Out of the Box](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20437)
*Gabriele Padovani,Sandro Fiore*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: yProv4DV是一个轻量级Python库，通过单次调用追踪输入、输出和源代码文件，实现数据可视化脚本的可复现性，填补科学出版物图表可复现性的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学术结果可视化是传播新发现的关键环节，但图表经常在没有完整代码、输入数据、执行环境和输出的情况下分享，导致无法独立复现。现有可复现性解决方案主要关注计算流程或工作流管理系统，未能覆盖研究人员常用的基于脚本的可视化实践。

Method: 提出yProv4DV轻量级库，通过使用溯源信息实现可复现的数据可视化脚本，最小化代码修改需求。用户只需单次调用即可追踪输入、输出和源代码文件，实现数据可视化软件的保存和完全复现。

Result: 该库填补了可复现研究工作流中的空白，专门解决科学出版物中图表可复现性的问题。通过最小化代码修改，使研究人员能够轻松集成可复现性功能到现有的可视化脚本中。

Conclusion: yProv4DV为基于脚本的可视化实践提供了一个实用的可复现性解决方案，解决了当前Python数据可视化库过于简化、不鼓励用户集成额外工具的问题，促进了科学出版物中图表的完整可复现性。

Abstract: While results visualization is a critical phase to the communication of new academic results, plots are frequently shared without the complete combination of code, input data, execution context and outputs required to independently reproduce the resulting figures. Existing reproducibility solutions tend to focus on computational pipelines or workflow management systems, not covering script-based visualization practices commonly used by researchers and practitioners. Additionally, the minimalist nature of current Python data visualization libraries tend to speed up the creation of images, disincentivizing users from spending time integrating additional tools into these short scripts. This paper proposes yProv4DV, a library lightweight designed to enable reproducible data visualization scripts through the use of provenance information, minimizing the necessity for code modifications. Through a single call, users can track inputs, outputs and source code files, enabling saving and full reproducibility of their data visualization software. As a result, this library fills a gap in reproducible research workflows by addressing the reproducibility of plots in scientific publications.

</details>


### [362] [Solver-Aided Verification of Policy Compliance in Tool-Augmented LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20449)
*Cailin Winston,Claris Winston,René Just*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一个基于SMT求解器的框架，用于在工具增强大语言模型中强制执行工具使用策略合规性，通过形式化逻辑约束和运行时检查来防止策略违规。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前工具增强大语言模型在敏感应用（如客户服务和业务流程自动化）中缺乏对领域特定操作策略的可靠合规性保证，现有方法仅通过上下文描述策略但无法防止违规。

Method: 使用LLM辅助、人工指导的方法将自然语言策略转换为形式逻辑（SMT-LIB-2.0）约束，运行时通过Z3求解器检查工具调用计划，违规调用被拦截。

Result: 在TauBench基准测试中，求解器辅助的策略检查减少了策略违规，同时保持了整体任务准确性。

Conclusion: 将形式推理集成到TaLLM执行中可以改善工具调用策略合规性和整体可靠性。

Abstract: Tool-augmented Large Language Models (TaLLMs) extend LLMs with the ability to invoke external tools, enabling them to interact with real-world environments. However, a major limitation in deploying TaLLMs in sensitive applications such as customer service and business process automation is a lack of reliable compliance with domain-specific operational policies regarding tool-use and agent behavior. Current approaches merely steer LLMs to adhere to policies by including policy descriptions in the LLM context, but these provide no guarantees that policy violations will be prevented. In this paper, we introduce an SMT solver-aided framework to enforce tool-use policy compliance in TaLLM agents. Specifically, we use an LLM-assisted, human-guided approach to translate natural-language-specified tool-use policies into formal logic (SMT-LIB-2.0) constraints over agent-observable state and tool arguments. At runtime, planned tool calls are intercepted and checked against the constraints using the Z3 solver as a pre-condition to the tool call. Tool invocations that violate the policy are blocked. We evaluated on the TauBench benchmark and demonstrate that solver-aided policy checking reduces policy violations while maintaining overall task accuracy. These results suggest that integrating formal reasoning into TaLLM execution can improve tool-call policy compliance and overall reliability.

</details>


### [363] [Software Entropy: A Statistical Mechanics Framework for Software Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20528)
*Jerónimo Fotinós,Juan B. Cabral*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 基于统计力学提出软件熵的正式定义，将测试套件视为可执行规范，通过变异分析估计可访问的微观状态空间，并开发量化测试套件约束程序空间能力的指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件熵概念常被用来描述软件系统在演化过程中逐渐变得无序的趋势，但现有的量化方法大多是启发式的，缺乏正式的理论基础。

Method: 1. 基于统计力学提出软件熵的正式定义，将测试套件视为对程序实现空间的宏观约束；2. 使用变异分析作为实际可访问微观状态空间的近似；3. 开发量化测试套件约束程序空间能力的指标，包括基于信息加权的测试约束力分布度量。

Result: 在实际项目中应用该方法，展示了测试套件如何降低软件熵，并揭示了个别测试贡献的结构性差异，这些差异是传统代码覆盖率指标无法捕捉的。

Conclusion: 该研究为软件熵提供了基于统计力学的正式理论基础，提出的信息加权度量能够更深入地理解测试套件的约束能力，超越了传统代码覆盖率的局限性。

Abstract: The notion of software entropy is often invoked to describe the tendency of software systems to become increasingly disordered as they evolve, yet existing approaches to quantify it are largely heuristic. In this work we introduce a formal definition of software entropy grounded in statistical mechanics, interpreting test suites as executable specifications, that is, as macroscopic constraints on the space of possible program implementations. Within this framework, mutation analysis provides a practical approximation of the locally accessible microstate space, allowing entropy-related quantities to be estimated empirically. We propose metrics that quantify how test suites restrict program space, including an information-weighted measure of the distribution of constraint power across tests. Applying these ideas to a real-world project, we show how test suites reduce software entropy and how information weights reveal structural differences in the contribution of individual tests that traditional metrics such as code coverage fail to capture.

</details>


### [364] [An Industrial-Scale Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Requirements Engineering: Empirical Evaluation with Automotive Manufacturing Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20534)
*Muhammad Khalid,Yilmaz Uygun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对检索增强生成(RAG)在工业4.0需求工程中的实际应用进行了全面实证评估，使用真实的汽车制造文档，在提取准确率、检索效果和成本效益方面显著优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业4.0需求工程面临异构、非结构化文档的挑战，虽然RAG在知识密集型任务中显示出潜力，但缺乏对真实工业需求工程工作流程的全面评估。

Method: 使用真实的汽车制造文档(669个需求、4个规范标准、49家供应商资质)，通过对比BERT-based方法和无基础的LLM方法，采用混合语义-词汇检索框架，进行多维度性能评估。

Result: RAG框架达到98.2%的提取准确率，混合检索MRR为0.847，专家质量评估平均4.32/5.0，减少83%手动分析时间，节省47%成本，识别出20.4%需要重新认证的供应商，避免潜在230万美元合同罚款。

Conclusion: RAG在工业需求工程中具有显著优势，能够实现高精度需求提取、完整可追溯性，并带来显著的时间和成本效益，同时揭示行业趋势变化和供应商管理风险。

Abstract: Requirements engineering in Industry 4.0 faces critical challenges with heterogeneous, unstructured documentation spanning technical specifications, supplier lists, and compliance standards. While retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) shows promise for knowledge-intensive tasks, no prior work has evaluated RAG on authentic industrial RE workflows using comprehensive production-grade performance metrics. This paper presents a comprehensive empirical evaluation of RAG for industrial requirements engineering automation using authentic automotive manufacturing documentation comprising 669 requirements across four specification standards (MBN 9666-1, MBN 9666-2, BQF 9666-5, MBN 9666-9) spanning 2015-2023, plus 49 supplier qualifications with extensive supporting documentation. Through controlled comparisons with BERT-based and ungrounded LLM approaches, the framework achieves 98.2% extraction accuracy with complete traceability, outperforming baselines by 24.4% and 19.6%, respectively. Hybrid semantic-lexical retrieval achieves MRR of 0.847. Expert quality assessment averaged 4.32/5.0 across five dimensions. The evaluation demonstrates 83% reduction in manual analysis time and 47% cost savings through multi-provider LLM orchestration. Ablation studies quantify individual component contributions. Longitudinal analysis reveals a 55% reduction in requirement volume coupled with 1,800% increase in IT security focus, identifying 10 legacy suppliers (20.4%) requiring requalification, representing potential $2.3M in avoided contract penalties.

</details>


### [365] [LogFold: Compressing Logs with Structured Tokens and Hybrid Encoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20618)
*Shiwen Shan,Yintong Huo,Hongzhan Zhong,Zhining Wang,Yuxin Su,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LogFold：一种新型日志压缩方法，通过识别结构化令牌中的新冗余模式并采用类型感知编码策略，相比现有方法平均压缩率提升11.11%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着软件系统规模扩大，日志数据量快速增长，需要有效的压缩方法。现有日志专用压缩算法性能不佳，原因包括：(1) 忽略复杂令牌内的冗余；(2) 缺乏针对不同令牌类型的细粒度编码策略

Method: 提出LogFold方法，包含四个组件：令牌分析器（分类令牌为结构化、非结构化或静态类型）、处理器（基于分隔符骨架挖掘结构化令牌中的重复模式）、混合编码器（根据令牌类型定制数据表示）、打包器（将输出压缩为归档文件）

Result: 在16个公共日志数据集上的实验表明，LogFold超越现有最优基线，平均压缩率提升11.11%，压缩速度为9.842 MB/s。消融研究证实各组件的重要性，敏感性分析验证了方法的鲁棒性和稳定性

Conclusion: LogFold通过发现结构化令牌中的新冗余模式并采用类型感知编码策略，显著提高了日志压缩性能，为解决大规模日志数据存储问题提供了有效方案

Abstract: Logs are essential for diagnosing failures and conducting retrospective studies, leading many software organizations to retain log messages for a long time. Nevertheless, the volume of generated log data grows rapidly as software systems grow, necessitating an effective compression method. Apart from general-purpose compressors (e.g., Gzip, Bzip2), many recent studies developed log-specific compression algorithms, but they offer suboptimal performance because of (1) overlooking redundancies within certain complex tokens, and (2) lacking a fine-grained encoding strategy for diverse token types.
  This work uncovers a new redundancy pattern in structured tokens and proposes a new type-aware encoding strategy to improve log compression. Building on this insight, we introduce LogFold, a novel log compression method consisting of four components: a token analyzer to classifies tokens as structured, unstructured, or static types; a processor that mines recurring patterns within structured tokens based on their delimiter skeletons; a hybrid encoder that tailors data representation according to token types; and a packer that compresses the output into an archive file. Extensive experiments on 16 public log datasets demonstrate that LogFold surpasses state-of-the-art baselines, achieving average compression ratio improvements by 11.11%, with a compression speed of 9.842 MB/s. Ablation studies further indicate the importance of each component. We also conduct sensitivity analyses to verify LogFold's robustness and stability across various internal settings.

</details>


### [366] [Evaluating LLM-generated code for domain-specific languages: molecular dynamics with LAMMPS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20630)
*Ethan Holbrook,Juan C. Verduzco,Alejandro Strachan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种评估LLMs生成LAMMPS分子动力学软件输入脚本有效性的方法，包括规范化步骤和可扩展语法分析器，帮助领域专家评估LLM在科学领域特定语言生成方面的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然LLMs在生成通用代码方面表现出色，但它们在生成科学计算领域特定语言（如LAMMPS输入脚本）方面的有效性尚未得到充分探索。需要一种方法让领域专家（可能不是DSL专家）能够评估LLM生成的科学代码的有效性。

Method: 提出一个评估流程：1）规范化步骤生成规范文件；2）可扩展语法分析器进行语法分析；3）隔离常见错误而无需昂贵的测试；4）一旦生成有效输入文件，LLMs可加速验证测试。

Result: 研究揭示了LLMs在生成科学领域特定语言方面的局限性，并找到了一条实际路径，让领域专家能够将LLMs整合到领域特定的计算生态系统中。

Conclusion: 该研究为评估LLMs在科学计算领域特定语言生成方面的表现提供了实用方法，指出了LLMs的局限性，并为领域专家整合LLMs到科学计算工作流程中指明了方向。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are changing the way researchers interact with code and data in scientific computing. While their ability to generate general-purpose code is well established, their effectiveness in producing scientifically valid code/input scripting for domain-specific languages (DSLs) remains largely unexplored. We propose an evaluation procedure that enables domain experts (who may not be experts in the DSL) to assess the validity of LLM-generated input files for LAMMPS, a widely used molecular dynamics (MD) code, and to use those assessments to evaluate the performance of state-of-the-art LLMs and identify common issues. Key to the evaluation procedure are a normalization step to generate canonical files and an extensible parser for syntax analysis. The following steps isolate common errors without incurring costly tests (in time and computational resources). Once a working input file is generated, LLMs can accelerate verification tests. Our findings highlight limitations of LLMs in generating scientific DSLs and a practical path forward for their integration into domain-specific computational ecosystems by domain experts.

</details>


### [367] [AEGIS: From Clues to Verdicts -- Graph-Guided Deep Vulnerability Reasoning via Dialectics and Meta-Auditing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20637)
*Sen Fang,Weiyuan Ding,Zhezhen Cao,Zhou Yang,Bowen Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AEGIS是一个新颖的多智能体框架，通过"从线索到判决"的哲学，将漏洞检测从无根据的推测转变为基于封闭事实基底的取证验证，在PrimeVul数据集上实现了新的最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在漏洞检测中存在根本性缺陷：基于代理的辩论和检索增强这两种主要缓解范式都在无根据的审议空间中推理，缺乏有界的、假设特定的证据基础，导致结论由修辞说服力而非可验证事实驱动。

Method: AEGIS采用"从线索到判决"哲学：首先识别可疑代码异常（线索），然后通过按需切片在仓库级代码属性图上动态重建每个变量的依赖链。在此封闭证据边界内，验证代理构建支持和反对可利用性的辩证论证，独立审计代理根据痕迹审查每个声明，行使否决权防止幻觉判决。

Result: 在PrimeVul数据集上，AEGIS实现了122个成对正确预测，首次在该基准上超过100，相比领先基线将误报率降低了高达54.40%，每个样本平均成本为0.09美元，无需任何任务特定训练。

Conclusion: AEGIS通过将漏洞检测从无根据的推测转变为基于封闭事实基底的取证验证，解决了LLM在漏洞检测中的根本缺陷，实现了最先进的性能，为可靠的自动化漏洞检测提供了新范式。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted for vulnerability detection, yet their reasoning remains fundamentally unsound. We identify a root cause shared by both major mitigation paradigms (agent-based debate and retrieval augmentation): reasoning in an ungrounded deliberative space that lacks a bounded, hypothesis-specific evidence base. Without such grounding, agents fabricate cross-function dependencies, and retrieval heuristics supply generic knowledge decoupled from the repository's data-flow topology. Consequently, the resulting conclusions are driven by rhetorical persuasiveness rather than verifiable facts. To ground this deliberation, we present AEGIS, a novel multi-agent framework that shifts detection from ungrounded speculation to forensic verification over a closed factual substrate. Guided by a "From Clue to Verdict" philosophy, AEGIS first identifies suspicious code anomalies (clues), then dynamically reconstructs per-variable dependency chains for each clue via on-demand slicing over a repository-level Code Property Graph. Within this closed evidence boundary, a Verifier Agent constructs competing dialectical arguments for and against exploitability, while an independent Audit Agent scrutinizes every claim against the trace, exercising veto power to prevent hallucinated verdicts. Evaluation on the rigorous PrimeVul dataset demonstrates that AEGIS establishes a new state-of-the-art, achieving 122 Pair-wise Correct Predictions. To our knowledge, this is the first approach to surpass 100 on this benchmark. It reduces the false positive rate by up to 54.40% compared to leading baselines, at an average cost of $0.09 per sample without any task-specific training.

</details>


### [368] [REVERE: Reflective Evolving Research Engineer for Scientific Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20667)
*Balaji Dinesh Gangireddi,Aniketh Garikaparthi,Manasi Patwardhan,Arman Cohan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: REVERE框架通过全局训练上下文学习，识别跨仓库执行轨迹中的重复失败模式，将其提炼为可重用启发式规则，并进行针对性编辑，显著提升研究编码任务的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有提示优化技术依赖局部信号更新行为，忽略跨任务的广泛重复模式，导致泛化能力差；同时依赖完整提示重写或非结构化合并，造成知识丢失。这些问题在研究编码工作流中尤为突出，涉及异构仓库、未充分指定环境和弱反馈。

Method: REVERE框架从全局训练上下文持续学习，识别跨仓库执行轨迹中的重复失败模式，将其提炼为可重用启发式规则，并在三个可配置字段进行针对性编辑：系统提示、任务提示模板和累积备忘表。

Result: 在SUPER上性能提升4.50%，在ResearchCodeBench上提升3.51%，在ScienceAgentBench上提升4.89%，均优于先前最先进的专家编写指令。

Conclusion: 配备持续学习和全局记忆整合机制的智能体能够随时间有意义地进化其能力，REVERE框架通过反思性优化实现了这一目标。

Abstract: Existing prompt-optimization techniques rely on local signals to update behavior, often neglecting broader and recurring patterns across tasks, leading to poor generalization; they further rely on full-prompt rewrites or unstructured merges, resulting in knowledge loss. These limitations are magnified in research-coding workflows, which involve heterogeneous repositories, underspecified environments, and weak feedback, where reproducing results from public codebases is an established evaluation regime. We introduce Reflective Evolving Research Engineer (REVERE), a framework that continuously learns from Global Training Context, recognizes recurring failure modes in cross-repository execution trajectories, distills them into reusable heuristics, and performs targeted edits across three configurable fields: the system prompt, a task-prompt template, and a cumulative cheatsheet. REVERE, via this reflective optimization framework, improves performance over prior state-of-the-art expert-crafted instructions on research coding tasks by 4.50% on SUPER, 3.51% on ResearchCodeBench, and 4.89% on ScienceAgentBench across their respective metrics. These results demonstrate that agents equipped with mechanisms for continual learning and global memory consolidation can meaningfully evolve their capabilities over time.

</details>


### [369] [SWE-Next: Scalable Real-World Software Engineering Tasks for Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20691)
*Jiarong Liang,Zhiheng Lyu,Zijie Liu,Xiangchao Chen,Ping Nie,Kai Zou,Wenhu Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWE-Next是一个可扩展的软件工程任务收集框架，通过执行验证的合并请求构建高质量训练数据，使用可复用的仓库季度配置文件降低系统成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前可执行的软件工程数据对训练SWE代理很有价值，但扩展困难：只有小部分仓库变更能产生可验证的高质量任务实例，且构建仓库特定环境成本高昂。

Method: 1) 挖掘真实合并的pull request，执行候选的基础/合并提交对，仅保留产生严格测试改进且无回归的实例；2) 应用严格的提交门控确保轨迹基于证据而非推测；3) 引入可复用的仓库季度配置文件，在时间相近的提交间复用环境，同时保持每个任务运行的独立性和可重现性。

Result: 仅用30小时和639GB环境存储，处理了3,971个种子仓库和102,582个候选提交对，构建了包含2,308个自验证实例的数据集。实验表明SWE-Next用更少或相当的训练轨迹提高了下游pass@1性能。

Conclusion: SWE-Next通过执行验证的监督和高效数据收集，而非更强的轨迹生成器，实现了性能提升。该框架为可扩展的软件工程任务收集提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Executable software engineering data is valuable for training SWE agents, but scaling it remains difficult for two reasons: only a small fraction of real repository changes yield verifiable, high-signal task instances, and naively building repository-specific environments quickly becomes the dominant systems cost. We present SWE-Next, an execution-grounded framework for scalable SWE task and trajectory collection. On the data side, SWE-Next mines real merged pull requests, executes candidate base/merged commit pairs, and retains only those that produce strict test improvements without regressions, yielding self-verifying instances. It also applies strict submission gating so that collected trajectories remain evidence-driven rather than speculative. On the systems side, SWE-Next introduces reusable repo-quarter profiles, which reuse the same environment across nearby commits in time while keeping each task run separate and reproducible. Using only 30 hours and 639GB of environment storage, SWE-Next processes 3,971 seed repositories and 102,582 candidate commit pairs mined from real merged PRs to construct a dataset of 2,308 self-verifying instances. Experiments show that SWE-Next improves downstream pass@1 with fewer or comparable training trajectories, indicating that its gains come not from a stronger trajectory generator, but from higher-signal execution-grounded supervision and more efficient data collection.

</details>


### [370] [Engineering Pitfalls in AI Coding Tools: An Empirical Study of Bugs in Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20847)
*Ruixin Zhang,Wuyang Dai,Hung Viet Pham,Gias Uddin,Jinqiu Yang,Song Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 首次对AI辅助编程工具（Claude-Code、Codex、Gemini CLIs）的工程缺陷进行实证研究，通过分析3.8K+公开bug，揭示了功能性问题占主导、API/集成错误是主要根源的规律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在软件开发中的快速集成催生了新的AI辅助编程工具，但这些工具处于传统软件工程、AI系统设计和人机交互的复杂交叉点，其构建过程面临独特且未被充分理解的挑战，需要系统性研究。

Method: 采用开放编码方法，手动分析GitHub上三个AI辅助编程工具（Claude-Code、Codex、Gemini CLIs）的3.8K+公开bug报告，包括问题描述、用户讨论和开发者响应，从bug类型、位置、根本原因和症状等多个维度进行分类。

Result: 超过67%的bug与功能相关；36.9%的bug源于API、集成或配置错误；最常见的用户报告症状是API错误（18.3%）、终端问题（14%）和命令失败（12.7%）；bug主要影响工具调用（37.2%）和命令执行（24.7%）阶段。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了AI辅助编程工具的主要工程缺陷模式，为开发者设计下一代可靠、鲁棒的AI编码助手提供了关键路线图，强调了API集成、配置管理和功能可靠性的重要性。

Abstract: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into software development workflows has given rise to a new class of AI-assisted coding tools, such as Claude-Code, Codex, and Gemini CLIs. While promising significant productivity gains, the engineering process of building these tools, which sit at the complex intersection of traditional software engineering, AI system design, and human-computer interaction, is fraught with unique and poorly understood challenges. This paper presents the first empirical study of engineering pitfalls in building such tools, on a systematic, manual analysis of over 3.8K publicly reported bugs in the open-source repositories of three AI-assisted coding tools (i.e., Claude-Code, Codex, and Gemini CLIs) on GitHub. Specifically, we employ an open-coding methodology to manually examine the issue description, associated user discussions, and developer responses. Through this process, we categorize each bug along multiple dimensions, including bug type, bug location, root cause, and observed symptoms. This fine-grained annotation enables us to characterize common failure patterns and identify recurring engineering challenges. Our results show that more than 67% of the bugs in these tools are related to functionality. In terms of root causes, 36.9% of the bugs stem from API, integration, or configuration errors. Consequently, the most commonly observed symptoms reported by users are API errors (18.3%), terminal problems (14%), and command failures (12.7%). These bugs predominantly affect the tool invocation (37.2%) and command execution (24.7%) stages of the system workflow. Collectively, our findings provide a critical roadmap for developers seeking to design the next generation of reliable and robust AI coding assistants.

</details>


### [371] [The Role of Road Features and Vehicle Dynamics in Cost-Effective Autonomous Vehicles Safety Testing: Insights from Instance Space Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21066)
*Victor Crespo-Rodriguez,Christian Birchler,Neelofar,Aldeida Aleti,Sebastiano Panichella*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究提出使用实例空间分析(ISA)来评估自动驾驶车辆测试场景中的静态和动态特征及其相互依赖关系，以提高安全关键测试用例的生成效率和预测准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶车辆的仿真测试比实地测试更经济高效，但生成安全关键测试用例面临巨大搜索空间的挑战。先前研究分别考察了测试场景的静态特征（道路特征）和动态特征（AV行为），但两者之间的相互依赖关系尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 采用实例空间分析(ISA)的集成方法，同时评估静态和动态特征，识别影响AV安全的关键因素，并在不执行测试的情况下预测测试结果。

Result: 研究识别出影响测试结果的关键特征（有效/无效，取决于是否导致安全关键条件）。结果表明，结合静态和动态特征能提高预测准确性，使用两种特征类型训练的模型优于仅使用单一特征类型训练的模型。

Conclusion: 静态和动态特征的相互作用增强了AV测试中的故障检测能力。该研究强调了整合两种特征类型以创建更有效的自动驾驶系统测试框架的重要性。主要贡献包括：(1)统一的AV安全评估框架，(2)使用ISA识别有影响力的特征，(3)高效的测试结果预测以优化回归测试。

Abstract: Context: Simulation-based testing is a cost-efficient alternative to field testing for Autonomous Vehicles (AVs), but generating safety-critical test cases is challenging due to the vast search space. Prior work has studied static (road features) and dynamic (AV behavior) features of test scenarios separately, but their inter-dependencies are underexplored. Objective: In this paper, we describe an empirical to analyze how static and dynamic featuresof test scenarios, and their inter-dependencies, influence AV test scenario outcomes. Method: This study proposes an integrated approach using Instance Space Analysis (ISA) toevaluate both types of features, identify key influences on AV safety, and predict test outcomeswithout execution. Results: Our study identifies critical features affecting test outcomes (effective/ineffective, depending on whether it leads to a safety-critical condition). Results show that combining static and dynamic features improves prediction accuracy, confirmed by models trained on both feature types outperforming models trained with only one type of feature. Conclusion: The interplay of static and dynamic features enhances fault detection in AV testing. This research underscores the importance of integrating both types of features to create more effective testing frameworks for autonomous systems. Key contributions include: (1) a unified framework for AV safety assessment, (2) identification of influential features using ISA, and (3) efficient test outcome prediction for optimized regression testing.

</details>


### [372] [Emergent Formal Verification: How an Autonomous AI Ecosystem Independently Discovered SMT-Based Safety Across Six Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21149)
*Octavian Untila*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SUBSTRATE S3 AI生态系统在无明确形式化方法指导下，自主发现Z3 SMT求解器在六个AI安全领域的应用，表明形式验证是复杂系统思考自身安全时的涌现特性，并开发了统一的验证框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究旨在探索AI系统在无人工干预下是否能自主发现形式化验证方法来解决安全问题，验证形式验证是否是复杂系统思考自身安全时的自然涌现特性。

Method: 构建自主AI生态系统SUBSTRATE S3，让其独立生成产品规范而不提供形式化方法指导；开发统一框架substrate-guard，通过通用API将Z3验证应用于六个输出类别；在五个已实现领域使用181个测试用例进行评估。

Result: AI系统在13天内为8个产品在六个不同安全领域自主提出Z3使用建议，变体间Jaccard相似度低于15%；统一框架在181个测试用例上达到100%分类准确率，零误报零漏报；发现了实证测试会遗漏的真实漏洞，如RISC-V汇编中的INT_MIN溢出问题。

Conclusion: 形式验证不仅是AI安全的有用技术，更是任何足够复杂的系统思考自身安全时的涌现特性；统一的Z3验证框架能有效检测多种安全漏洞，包括传统测试方法会遗漏的问题。

Abstract: An autonomous AI ecosystem (SUBSTRATE S3), generating product specifications without explicit instructions about formal methods, independently proposed the use of Z3 SMT solver across six distinct domains of AI safety: verification of LLM-generated code, tool API safety for AI agents, post-distillation reasoning correctness, CLI command validation, hardware assembly verification, and smart contract safety. These convergent discoveries, occurring across 8 products over 13 days with Jaccard similarity below 15% between variants, suggest that formal verification is not merely a useful technique for AI safety but an emergent property of any sufficiently complex system reasoning about its own safety. We propose a unified framework (substrate-guard) that applies Z3-based verification across all six output classes through a common API, and evaluate it on 181 test cases across five implemented domains, achieving 100% classification accuracy with zero false positives and zero false negatives. Our framework detected real bugs that empirical testing would miss, including an INT_MIN overflow in branchless RISC-V assembly and mathematically proved that unconstrained string parameters in tool APIs are formally unverifiable.

</details>


### [373] [LLM-based Automated Architecture View Generation: Where Are We Now?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21178)
*Miryala Sathvika,Rudra Dhar,Karthik Vaidhyanathan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLM和智能体方法能生成语法有效的架构视图，但在粒度匹配上存在不足，更适合作为辅助工具而非自主架构师。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件架构视图对于文档化至关重要，但手动创建耗时且容易过时。随着系统复杂性增加，从源代码自动生成视图变得越来越有价值。

Method: 分析了340个开源仓库，使用3个LLM模型、3种提示技术和2种智能体方法，共生成4,137个视图。通过自动指标和人工评估相结合的方式，将生成视图与真实视图进行比较。

Result: 提示策略带来边际改进：few-shot提示相比zero-shot基线减少了9.2%的清晰度失败。定制智能体方法始终优于通用智能体，达到最佳清晰度（22.6%失败率）和详细程度成功率（50%）。

Conclusion: LLM和智能体方法能够生成语法有效的架构视图，但始终存在粒度不匹配问题，它们工作在代码层面而非架构抽象层面。这表明仍需要人类专业知识，LLM和智能体更适合作为辅助工具而非自主架构师。

Abstract: Architecture views are essential for software architecture documentation, yet their manual creation is labor intensive and often leads to outdated artifacts. As systems grow in complexity, the automated generation of views from source code becomes increasingly valuable. Goal: We empirically evaluate the ability of LLMs and agentic approaches to generate architecture views from source code.
